rationale.D1: Confirmed CTRE swerve generator (TunerConstants + CommandSwerveDrivetrain extends SwerveDrivetrain) provides a vendored drivetrain abstraction, but all four mechanism subsystems (Arm, Shooter, Intake, Feeder) directly instantiate TalonFX hardware with no IO interface or sim variant — no *IO layer exists for mechanisms.
rationale.D2: Confirmed command-based with button bindings in RobotContainer dispatching InstantCommands; the index flagged a State enum but no actual FSM or coordinator class was found — bindings are direct method calls to subsystems with no state machine logic.
rationale.D3: Confirmed simulationPeriodic in CommandSwerveDrivetrain calls updateSimState (CTRE swerve built-in) but Robot.simulationPeriodic is empty and no WPILib physics classes (ElevatorSim, etc.) are wired for any mechanism — swerve-only token sim.
rationale.D4: Confirmed no src/test directory exists and no .github/workflows — zero tests.
rationale.D5: Confirmed SmartDashboard.put* calls scattered through Arm and Limelight, and CTRE SignalLogger.start() used in Robot and Telemetry for drivetrain odometry — SmartDashboard-level logging only, no structured logging framework.
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlannerLib vendordep present and actively used: AutoBuilder.configureHolonomic in CommandSwerveDrivetrain, AutoBuilder.buildAutoChooser in RobotContainer, 11+ .auto files and 20+ .path files in deploy/pathplanner — real multi-auto PathPlanner deployment.
rationale.D7: Confirmed Limelight.java calls drivetrain.addVisionMeasurement with latency-compensated timestamps and confidence-scaled std-devs, with field-boundary rejection and multi-tag trust logic — functional pose estimation with basic filtering; no IO interface or sim variant.
rationale.D8: Confirmed README.md exists with team/season info and brief instructions (based on CTRE example), Constants.java is organized, no CI workflows and no separate library repo found.
